name: Chocolate Dot Pancakes
recipeIngredient: Soft vanilla ice cream OR Cool Whip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pancake mix, sugar, and chocolate chips in a bowl.
2. Stir in the milk and egg until well mixed.
3. Drop by heaping tablespoons onto a heated grill or skillet.
4. Fry until bubbly, then turn and brown on the other side.
5. Serve with soft vanilla ice cream or Cool Whip layered between two pancakes.
